web.title: You.com Docs
snippets: You.com gives developers APIs for AI apps that need current web context.
The docs describe search, page content, and deeper research workflows.

web.title: Grounding LLM responses with citations
snippets: Search results include enough source metadata to connect generated claims back to URLs.

web.title: MCP server for web search
snippets: The MCP setup lets compatible assistants call You.com web tools from inside their normal workflow.
